name: HELIOS
problem: Modern multi-cloud architectures create event consistency nightmares. Events across AWS, GCP, and Azure can be lost, duplicated, or arrive out-of-order — causing silent data corruption at scale.
solution: Designed and built a multi-cloud reconciliation engine that guarantees 99.99% event consistency using an O(1) Redis/Bloom-filter deduplication index and consistent hashing for distribution across 1M+ daily events. Added a MAPE-K self-healing loop with a TOPSIS decision engine for automated recovery.
metrics: MTTR reduced from hours to <30 seconds via intelligent replay

name: Cold Email Generator
problem: Personalizing cold emails for job applications at scale is time-consuming. Generic emails have low conversion rates. Candidates need a way to auto-personalize based on specific job descriptions.
solution: Built an LLM-powered Streamlit app that reads a job description, retrieves relevant projects from a ChromaDB vector store, and generates a tailored cold email via LangChain — cutting manual effort by ~80%.
metrics: ~80% reduction in manual email writing time
~50% improvement in customization speed and usability

name: mini-bitcoin-script
description: Bitcoin Script parsing and execution engine in Rust
problem: Understanding Bitcoin's scripting language requires either reading dense spec documents or using heavyweight implementations. No lightweight, educational yet functional engine existed in Rust.
solution: Built a minimal Bitcoin Script parsing and execution engine in Rust, published as a crate on crates.io. Implements the full Script opcode set including cryptographic operations.
metrics: Published on crates.io (Rust public package registry)
Full Bitcoin Script opcode parsing and execution

name: VAE Anomaly Detection
description: Unsupervised multimodal anomaly detection using Variational Autoencoders
problem: Industrial failures from unexpected sensor deviations are costly and hard to predict. Traditional threshold-based monitoring fails to capture subtle, multi-sensor correlated anomalies.
solution: Designed an unsupervised anomaly detection system using Variational Autoencoders trained on multimodal sensor data. The model learns normal behavior distributions and flags statistical deviations.
metrics: VAE architecture for unsupervised anomaly scoring

name: Amazon Review Sentiment Analyzer
description: NLP pipeline for real-time sentiment analysis of product reviews
problem: Manually analyzing thousands of product reviews for sentiment patterns is impractical. Teams need automated, accurate sentiment classification at scale.
solution: Engineered a scalable NLP pipeline using TF-IDF and Logistic Regression, deployed as an interactive Streamlit application for real-time sentiment analysis with batch processing.
metrics: 93.49% accuracy on both train and test sets

name: Transaction Analyzer
description: Financial data analytics dashboard with automated reporting
problem: Tracking income, expenses, and financial trends across raw CSV transaction data is tedious and error-prone without purpose-built tooling.
solution: Built a Streamlit-based web application that processes raw transaction data into clear breakdowns, interactive charts, and automated Excel reports.
